notes: Runtime causal logs intentionally omit positions and raw perceptions.
Full initial positions and configurations are stored by InitializationLogger.
Initial AlphaSynuclein state nodes are written at tick 0 so non-reactive proteins remain visible in G0 analyses.
Aggregate nodes carry the current aggregate state and member count in value, enabling LewyBody size summaries.
MPI ranks write rank-local JSONL files first; rank 0 merges them at close to keep JSONL rows atomic.

AGGREGATE_MATURES_LEWY_BODY.description: An oligomer aggregate matures into a Lewy body.

ALPHA_AGGREGATION.description: AggregateRegistry creates or grows alpha-synuclein aggregates.

ALPHA_MISFOLDING.description: Alpha-synuclein misfolds from basal, oxidative-stress, or aggregate-seeded pressure when the stochastic draw succeeds.

ALPHA_OLIGOMERIZATION_INTENTION.description: Misfolded alpha-synuclein becomes willing to oligomerize after a successful stochastic check.

ASTROCYTE_REACTIVE_STRESS_HIGH.description: Astrocyte becomes Reactive when inflammation or debris exceeds high thresholds.

LYSOSOME_DEGRADATION.description: Lysosome attempts to degrade or repair its assigned target.

LYSOSOME_TARGET_ASSIGNMENT.description: Lysosome claims a registered degradation target.

MICROGLIA_ACTIVATION_ALPHA_HIGH.description: Microglia can become Activated with probability proportional to nearby alpha pressure between its low and high thresholds.

MICROGLIA_ACTIVATION_INFLAMMATION_HIGH.description: Microglia can become Activated with probability proportional to inflammation pressure between its low and high thresholds.

MICROGLIA_CLEARING_DEBRIS_PRESSURE.description: Microglia can become Clearing with probability proportional to extracellular debris pressure between its low and high thresholds.

NEURON_DAMAGE_ACCUMULATION.description: Neuron damage state changes after external and internal stress are combined.

NEURON_REGISTER_DEGRADATION_TARGET.description: Neuron exposes an intracellular agent to lysosomal targeting.

thresholds.description: Full configs are stored in initialization logs; runtime edges keep rule_id and compact predicates.
